# Pixel-to-GPS conversion happens only in the executor

`VER-pixel-coordinate-output`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| verification | draft |

Inspect Executor.execute: the goto_pixel branch must call MapCompositor.pixel_to_gps before issuing any MAVLink message. Verify that no other component (planner, state machine, main) performs pixel_to_gps. Inspect a mission log to confirm (x, y) pixel values appear in the decisions.jsonl params, not GPS coordinates.

**Method:** inspection · **scope:** [CMP-executor](../../system/CMP-mission-computer/CMP-executor/README.md) · **latest outcome:** passed
